message:
feat(ufunc,iter,conformance): expand ufunc implementations and update RNG conformance golden values

ufunc (1386 lines changed):
- Major expansion of ufunc operations with improved NumPy-compatible
  implementations across statistical distributions and mathematical functions
- Enhanced type handling and edge case coverage

iter:
- Iterator improvements for better compatibility with NumPy array traversal
  patterns (77 lines changed)

conformance:
- Update golden values for RNG-dependent distribution tests (standard_normal,
  normal, exponential, gamma, beta, chisquare, lognormal, cauchy, weibull,
  f_distribution, standard_t) to match corrected RNG implementation
- Values changed reflect fixes to the underlying PRNG sequence generation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
